name: Box Wrangler
short_description: Dive into Box Wrangler, a thrilling multiplayer roguelike where every game is a fresh challenge! Earn XP to level up during each match while collecting coins to boost your skills for future battles. Harness the power of an array of weapons and enhancements, reaching ridiculous levels of power.
detailed_description:
Dive into Box Wrangler, a thrilling multiplayer roguelike where every game is a fresh challenge! Earn temporary XP to level up during each match while collecting coins to boost your skills for future battles. Harness the power of an array of weapons and enhancements, reaching ridiculous levels of power.

Upgrade your abilities with collected coins, including:

Bullet explosion chance
Health boosts
Increased coin value
Enhanced damage

Achieve 500 kills to escape the first level and earn 50% more coins. Join the adventure, power up, and become the ultimate Box Wrangler!
